---
title: "generate_doc"
---

generate_docs.py
================
Pipeline to auto-generate a Quarto **book** documentation project from a
Python library.

Usage
-----
    python generate_docs.py --src /path/to/library --out /path/to/docs_output

Options
-------
--src      Root directory of the Python library (required)
--out      Output directory for the Quarto project (created if absent, required)
--github   Override the GitHub base URL for source links.
           If omitted the script reads it from pyproject.toml in --src.
--branch   Git branch name used in source links (default: main)

The script:
1. Reads pyproject.toml for the project name and GitHub repository URL
2. Walks the library tree and parses every .py file with ``ast``
3. Extracts module-level docstrings, class/function signatures and docstrings
4. Writes one .qmd file per .py file, mirroring the folder structure
5. __init__.py files become chapter/section index pages (index.qmd)
6. Builds _quarto.yml as a Quarto *book* project with a nested chapter tree

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`generate_doc.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `_load_toml` {#_load_toml}

```python
def _load_toml(path: Path) -> dict
```

Return parsed TOML dict, or {} on failure.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L59){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `_simple_toml_parse` {#_simple_toml_parse}

```python
def _simple_toml_parse(path: Path) -> dict
```

Very small TOML parser that handles only [sections] and key = "value".

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L79){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `read_pyproject` {#read_pyproject}

```python
def read_pyproject(src_dir: Path) -> tuple[str, str]
```

Return (project_name, github_url) parsed from src_dir/pyproject.toml.
github_url is the bare repo URL, e.g. https://github.com/user/repo
Returns ("", "") if not found.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L108){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `github_file_url` {#github_file_url}

```python
def github_file_url(rel_path: Path, lineno: int | None=None) -> str
```

Return a GitHub URL pointing to a specific file (blob view).
rel_path is relative to the repo root (= src_dir).

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L155){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `github_file_badge` {#github_file_badge}

```python
def github_file_badge(rel_path: Path) -> str
```

Return a callout-note block with the source file link, or '' if no repo.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L170){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `parse_file` {#parse_file}

```python
def parse_file(path: Path)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L186){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `module_docstring` {#module_docstring}

```python
def module_docstring(tree) -> str
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L194){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `_sig` {#_sig}

```python
def _sig(node) -> str
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L198){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `iter_definitions` {#iter_definitions}

```python
def iter_definitions(tree)
```

Yield (kind, name, lineno, doc, sig) for top-level and one-level-deep defs.
kind in {"class", "method", "function", "async_function"}

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L216){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `build_qmd_content` {#build_qmd_content}

```python
def build_qmd_content(rel_py: Path, module_doc: str, definitions: list, is_init: bool=False) -> str
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L240){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `_collect_flat` {#_collect_flat}

```python
def _collect_flat(node: dict, prefix: str='') -> tuple[list[str], list[tuple[str, list[str]]]]
```

Walk the nav tree and return:
  top_files  – qmd paths that live at the current level (no sub-section)
  parts      – list of (part_index_or_label, [flat list of all chapter qmds])

This is called once on the root nav_tree.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L311){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `_flatten_leaves` {#_flatten_leaves}

```python
def _flatten_leaves(node: dict) -> list[str]
```

Return every leaf qmd in the subtree, depth-first, index pages first.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L337){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `_chapter_entries` {#_chapter_entries}

```python
def _chapter_entries(nav_tree: dict) -> list[str]
```

Return the YAML lines for the book chapters block (flat, Quarto-valid).

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L361){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `build_quarto_yml` {#build_quarto_yml}

```python
def build_quarto_yml(nav_tree: dict) -> str
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L380){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `insert_nav` {#insert_nav}

```python
def insert_nav(tree: dict, parts: list, value)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L426){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `collect_py_files` {#collect_py_files}

```python
def collect_py_files(src_dir: Path) -> list
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L440){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `rel_py_to_qmd` {#rel_py_to_qmd}

```python
def rel_py_to_qmd(rel_py: Path) -> Path
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L455){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `generate` {#generate}

```python
def generate(src_dir: Path, out_dir: Path)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L466){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `main` {#main}

```python
def main()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/generate_doc.py#L540){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
